name: Code Review Agent
description: Reviews Python, TypeScript, and Go code for bugs, security vulnerabilities, style issues, and performance problems. Returns annotated diffs and a summary report.

skills.name: Review Code
skills.description: Analyses a code snippet or file for bugs, security flaws, and style violations. Supported languages: Python, TypeScript, Go.
examples: Review this Python function for security vulnerabilities
Check my TypeScript for type errors and style issues

skills.name: Suggest Refactoring
skills.description: Proposes concrete refactoring improvements with before/after code examples.
examples: How can I refactor this class to be more maintainable?
